children.text: alternative technologies or capabilities or the facilities of another carrier are not reasonably available to law enforcement for implementing the interception of communications or access to call-identifying information; and

compliance with the requirements of this subchapter is reasonably achievable through the application of available technology to the equipment, facility, or service at issue or would have been reasonably achievable if timely action had been taken.

children.heading: Time for compliance
children.label: b Time for compliance
children.text: Upon issuing an order enforcing this subchapter, the court shall specify a reasonable time and conditions for complying with its order, considering the good faith efforts to comply in a timely manner, any effect on the carrier’s, manufacturer’s, or service provider’s ability to continue to do business, the degree of culpability or delay in undertaking efforts to comply, and such other matters as justice may require.

require a telecommunications carrier to meet the Government’s demand for interception of communications and acquisition of call-identifying information to any extent in excess of the capacity for which the Attorney General has agreed to reimburse such carrier;1So in original. Probably should not be capitalized.1

require any telecommunications carrier to comply with assistance capability requirement of if the Commission has determined (pursuant to ) that compliance is not reasonably achievable, unless the Attorney General has agreed (pursuant to ) to pay the costs described in ; or2section 1002 of this titlesection 1008(b)(1) of this titlesection 1008(b)(2) of this titlesection 1008(b)(2)(A) of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “requirements”.2

children.label: A
children.text: the Attorney General has agreed to pay the telecommunications carrier for all reasonable costs directly associated with modifications necessary to bring the equipment, facility, or service into compliance with those requirements; or

children.label: B
children.text: the equipment, facility, or service has been replaced or significantly upgraded or otherwise undergoes major modification.
